overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a moonlit dirt path through rural countryside. The character passes a dilapidated hut, continues through a flowering orchard, passes a wooden log cabin, and encounters a group of soldiers before continuing along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through flowering orchard

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with swords on his back, moving away from a dilapidated wooden hut visible in the distance

entered.detail: small weathered wooden structure with damaged roof visible in the background
narrow winding dirt trail through grassy terrain
trees with white blossoms lining the right side of the path
tall grass and vegetation covering the rolling hills
tall thin trees with white bark on the left side

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a moonlit dirt path through open countryside, leaving behind a dilapidated wooden hut. Flowering trees with white blossoms line the right side of the trail while birch trees and tall grass fill the left side.

events.description: wooden log cabin becomes visible in the distance ahead on the path
Geralt passes the wooden cabin on his right side

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path, approaching and then passing a wooden log cabin on his right side

entered.detail: small log cabin with wooden walls and sloped roof
rustic wooden fence posts along the left side of the path
tall sunflowers with yellow blooms growing on the left side

segments.scene_description: As Geralt continues walking, a wooden log cabin appears ahead and is passed on the right. Sunflowers and wooden fences become visible on the left side of the path while the flowering trees recede into the distance.

events.description: group of soldiers in armor appears ahead standing on the path
Geralt walks through the group of soldiers who step aside

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching and walking through a group of soldiers standing on the path, continuing forward after passing them

notable_agents.action: group of soldiers in red armor standing on the path, stepping aside to let Geralt pass through

segments.scene_description: The path opens up as Geralt leaves the cabin and sunflower area behind. A group of soldiers appears ahead standing on the trail, and Geralt walks through them as they step aside, continuing along the dirt path into the open countryside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit rural trail that transitions from a secluded orchard to an open countryside encounter. It begins with Geralt walking away from a dilapidated wooden hut, flanked by white flowering trees on the right and birch trees with tall grass on the left. As he continues forward, the flowering trees recede and the scenery shifts to include a wooden log cabin on the right and sunflowers behind wooden fences on the left. The path then opens up as the cabin and sunflowers fade behind him, bringing a group of soldiers into view. Finally, the camera follows Geralt as he walks through the group of soldiers who step aside, allowing him to proceed further along the dirt path into the open night.
